title: Illusionist / 幻术师
description:
A standalone mirror-and-illusion character for Slay the Spire 2, with three coupled systems:

- Mirror: "Copy" summons mirror images that replay your first card each turn and shatter when you take unblocked damage.
- Intent: read and reflect enemy telegraphs (Counter, Foresight, Provoke).
- Transmute: temporarily reshape your own cards (Shifting Blade, Myriad Faces, Phantom Blast), with a transmute stack that unwinds one layer per turn.

~40 themed cards, custom relics and potions, a starter relic, and Orobas (Ancient) relic/card upgrades.

Fully localized in English and 简体中文.
changeNote: v0.3.1 - Big art & animation update. The character now uses a real animated Spine skeleton (combat, mirror clones, rest site, and shop) driven by the game's own animator. Full custom art: card portraits, top-bar & character-select avatars, character-select background, relic/potion/power icons, the card energy orb, the combat energy counter, and a recoloured card frame. New cards: Channel (X-cost), Metamorphosis, Reckoning. Intent-system reworks (Counter, Provoke, Myriad Faces, Riposte, Aging) and the renamed Illusionist's Wrath; Feint is now a 3-cost Stun that gains Retain when upgraded; Head Start renamed Swift Boots. Fixes: relic inspect-screen crash, character-select relic icon, and several spine/asset crashes. English & 简体中文.
